hero.title: Hi, I'm Mahesh Mali
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer & AI Enthusiast
hero.description: Main aise web experiences banata hoon jo human creativity aur artificial intelligence ko ek saath laate hain.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Main Mahesh Mali hoon — ek curious developer jo India se hai aur web aur AI ka combination explore karna pasand karta hai.
about.body:
Meri tech journey curiosity se shuru hui — yeh samajhne se ki internet kaise kaam karta hai. Waqt ke saath, yeh curiosity ek gehre passion mein badal gayi — intelligent, fast, aur useful web applications banana.

Main believe karta hoon ki technology ko simple aur empowering hona chahiye, overwhelming nahi. Isliye main har project mein clarity, performance aur real value pe focus karta hoon — chahe woh ek clean portfolio ho ya ek AI-powered platform.

Farki farki technologies explore karna, naye AI tools try karna, aur real-world problems solve karna — yahi mujhe energize karta hai.

projects.title: AI Chat Platform
projects.description: An intelligent real-time chat platform using NLP and keyword-based AI responses. Designed for seamless user interaction with a clean dark UI.

projects.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
projects.description: A responsive e-commerce management interface with product tracking, order analytics, and automated report generation built with vanilla JS.

projects.title: Smart Portfolio Builder
projects.description: AI-powered drag-and-drop portfolio builder that recommends layouts and structures content intelligently for developers and designers.

projects.title: Lead Intelligence CRM
projects.description: A smart CRM tool that scores and prioritizes incoming leads using behavioral data, helping businesses focus on high-conversion prospects.

chatbot_knowledge.response: Hello! 👋 Main Mahesh ka AI assistant hoon. Aap unke kaam, skills aur projects ke baare mein kuch bhi pooch sakte hain!
Main Mahesh Mali ke platform ka AI assistant hoon. Mahesh ke projects, skills ya contact ke baare mein koi bhi sawaal poochho — main help karunga!

Mahesh Mali ek passionate full-stack developer aur AI enthusiast hain jo India se hain. Wo intelligent web applications banate hain — JavaScript, React, Node.js aur AI integration unki core expertise hai.

Mahesh ke skills: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, REST APIs, AI/ML Integration, UI/UX Design, aur Prompt Engineering. Wo aise products banate hain jo great design aur AI intelligence ko combine karte hain.

Mahesh ne kai interesting projects banaye hain — AI Chat Platform, E-Commerce Dashboard, Smart Portfolio Builder, aur Lead Intelligence CRM. Saare projects dekhne ke liye Projects page visit karo! Kuch aur projects bhi jald aane waale hain 🚀

Mahesh se directly contact karo:
📧 maheshmali11884@gmail.com
📱 +91 9039473519

Ya Contact page pe form bharo — wo personally reply karte hain!
Mahesh freelance aur full-time dono projects pe kaam karte hain. Pricing project ke scope pe depend karti hai. Best hai seedha Contact page se reach karo ya yahan apni details chhod do.
Mahesh abhi naye projects ke liye available hain! 🟢 Timeline aur availability ke liye Contact page se poochho.
Mahesh ko web development mein kaafi experience hai. AI-powered applications banana unka ek alag passion hai — latest tools aur technologies ke saath hamesha updated rehte hain.
Main Mahesh ke baare mein batane mein help kar sakta hoon — unke skills, projects, services, ya contact details. Chahte ho toh apni details yahan chhod do, Mahesh khud contact karenge! 😊
Shukriya! 🙏 Kabhi bhi wapas aana. Koi project ya idea hai toh zaroor share karo — Mahesh sab ke saath kaam karne ke liye open hain!
Mahesh India mein based hain aur globally remote projects karte hain. 🌍 Location koi barrier nahi hai!
Mahesh ka GitHub: github.com/Maheshsuman11 — Wahan unke public projects aur code explore kar sakte ho!
